title: koeleria albescens var. arenaria
intro: Koeleria albescens var. arenaria, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Koeleria albescens var. arenaria is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
